title: Agent Identity Protocol - Zero-trust security layer for AI agents with policy enforcement proxy for MCP
snippet: Open-source standard for authentication, attestation, authorization, and governance of AI agents. Agents receive cryptographic identities from the AIP Registry with Token Issuers signing AATs.

title: Agent Identity Management: IAM layer for AI agents with cryptographic identity and capability authorization
snippet: The IAM layer for AI agents: cryptographic identity, capability authorization, and audit trails for non-human identities. AIM 1.0 met all gate criteria as of 2026-05-28.

title: Agent Auth Protocol - Open-source standard for AI agent authentication and capability-based authorization
snippet: Open-source standard and implementation for AI agent authentication, capability-based authorization, and service discovery.

title: ZeroID: Open-source identity platform for autonomous AI agents
snippet: ZeroID is an open-source identity and credentialing layer for autonomous agents and multi-agent systems, targeting attribution in agentic workflows.

title: AgentGraph — open-source trust verification for AI agents
snippet: Open-source trust infrastructure for AI agents providing security scans, trust scores, verified identity, and embeddable badges in approximately 2 minutes.

title: Agent Identity Verification: How AI Agents Authenticate Purchases in 2026
snippet: Overview of how AI agents authenticate purchases using identity verification protocols including DID-based identity with behavioral trust scoring.

title: Agent Auth: The Problem That Kills Production Agents
snippet: Explores the gap in LangChain/LangGraph tool authorization — OAuth flows for every service, token management across users, and how agent auth differs from traditional app auth.

title: Authentication & access control - Docs by LangChain
snippet: Official LangChain docs on authentication and access control for LangSmith, covering API keys, OAuth, and organization-level permissions.

title: From Auth to Action: The Complete Guide to Secure, Scalable AI Agent Infrastructure (2026)
snippet: End-to-end guide covering agent authentication, credential management, OAuth token handling, and secure tool execution for production AI agents including LangChain integrations.

title: Authentication System | langchain-ai/oap-langgraph-tools-agent | DeepWiki
snippet: Deep dive into LangChain's authentication middleware that intercepts tool calls to trigger OAuth, stores tokens in runtime context, and automatically injects credentials into API calls.

title: Agent and Agent Runtime — AutoGen
snippet: Documents the Agent base interface with unique AgentId identifier and AgentMetadata dictionary. Agent runtime manages lifecycle, message routing, and instance creation based on agent type and key.

title: AI Agent Privacy and Security: Identity-First Guide | Okta
snippet: Okta's guide to securing AI agent data privacy via identity-first architecture: token-based machine authentication, scoped permissions, credential rotation, and compliance audit trails.

title: AI Spending in 2026: How Exactly Enterprises Can Maximize ROI
snippet: Real-time cost controls enforce spending limits per team, service, and endpoint before inference cost accumulates through hard token budgets. Every AI agent action, tool invocation, and model call logged with structured metadata for compliance evidence.
source_query: enterprise AI agent spending policy controls

title: Overview of Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Identity - Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
snippet: Overview of AgentCore Identity including workload identities that persist across deployment environments and authentication schemes, supporting IAM roles, OAuth2 tokens, and API keys.

title: High-level summary of the AI Act | EU Artificial Intelligence Act
snippet: From 2 August 2026, high-risk AI agents are subject to additional requirements ensuring safety and trustworthiness. AI agents interacting with natural persons or generating content must meet transparency rules.
source_query: EU AI Act agent identity requirements 2026

title: $3.6 Billion in funding and 10 Agentic AI security startups reshaping 2026
snippet: Over $392M in new agentic AI security funding announced around RSAC. Agentic AI spending projected at $201.9B in 2026 with 100%+ YoY growth.

title: AI Agent Wallets in 2026: How Crypto Is Being Rebuilt for Autonomous On-Chain AI
snippet: Overview of the agent wallet landscape including Privy, Dynamic (acquired by Fireblocks Oct 2025), Coinbase Agentic Wallets, and emerging standards like ERC-8004 for on-chain agent identity registries and DID-based persistence across networks.
